recommended_action: monitoring and reinspection within 90 days
text: 2025-01-15 inspection of bridge BR-042 found minor spalling near expansion joint J3, approximately 10 cm by 18 cm. No exposed reinforcement observed. Recommended action: monitoring and reinspection within 90 days. Severity recorded as medium. Photo reference: BR-042_spalling_001.jpg.

recommended_action: priority partial-depth patch
text: 2025-02-01 inspection of bridge BR-042 found growth of prior spall near J3 with loose concrete and shallow delamination. Possible traffic exposure at lane edge. Recommended action: priority partial-depth patch. Severity recorded as high. Photo reference: BR-042_spalling_002.jpg.

recommended_action: cleaning, coating assessment, and drainage review
text: 2025-02-18 inspection of bridge BR-017 found rust staining and surface corrosion on exterior steel girder near drainage outlet. No visible section loss. Recommended action: cleaning, coating assessment, and drainage review. Severity recorded as medium. Photo reference: BR-017_corrosion_003.jpg.

recommended_action: seal crack and monitor for recurrence
text: 2025-03-07 inspection of bridge BR-088 found transverse deck crack approximately 0.4 mm wide with light efflorescence. Recommended action: seal crack and monitor for recurrence. Severity recorded as medium. Photo reference: BR-088_crack_004.jpg.

recommended_action: concrete restoration within current maintenance cycle
text: 2025-03-24 inspection of bridge BR-031 found localized concrete loss on parapet face with exposed reinforcement and rust staining. Recommended action: concrete restoration within current maintenance cycle. Severity recorded as high. Photo reference: BR-031_exposed_rebar_005.jpg.

recommended_action: joint seal replacement and drainage cleaning
text: 2025-04-10 inspection of bridge BR-064 found failed joint seal with debris accumulation and water leakage below deck. Recommended action: joint seal replacement and drainage cleaning. Severity recorded as medium. Photo reference: BR-064_joint_damage_006.jpg.

recommended_action: trace leak source and repair joint seal
text: 2025-04-27 inspection of bridge BR-019 found persistent leakage path and staining on pier cap below deck joint. Recommended action: trace leak source and repair joint seal. Severity recorded as medium. Photo reference: BR-019_water_leak_007.jpg.

recommended_action: routine inspection interval
text: 2025-05-14 inspection of bridge BR-073 found deck surface visually stable with no new cracks or spalls in sampled inspection images. Recommended action: routine inspection interval. Severity recorded as low. Photo reference: BR-073_normal/no_defect_008.jpg.

recommended_action: hands-on inspection and section-loss measurement
text: 2025-05-31 inspection of bridge BR-055 found pack rust observed near bearing plate. Access limited by debris and shadowing. Recommended action: hands-on inspection and section-loss measurement. Severity recorded as medium. Photo reference: BR-055_corrosion_009.jpg.

recommended_action: monitoring only
text: 2025-06-17 inspection of bridge BR-026 found longitudinal sidewalk crack with no displacement and no water staining. Recommended action: monitoring only. Severity recorded as medium. Photo reference: BR-026_crack_010.jpg.
